title: Presentation Customization Overlay
description: Role-scoped, presentation-only overrides applied at runtime on top of presentation.jsonc. Files named presentation-custom-NN.jsonc (NN = two digits) in the model directory are applied in ascending NN order; later files win. A file applies to a user when 'roles' is empty or intersects the user's roles. Base model files are never modified by customizations.

description.description: Human description of what this customization changes and for whom.

roles.description: Role names this overlay applies to. Empty or omitted means it applies to every user. Role scoping is a presentation convenience, not security: all overlays ship in the frontend bundle and data access is still enforced by the backend security rules.

menu.description: Granular patch operations applied in order to the effective sidebar menu (the presentation.jsonc 'menu' after earlier overlays). Each operation addresses an entry through 'target'; an operation whose target does not resolve is skipped (warned in dev), so patches degrade gracefully as the base menu evolves instead of freezing a full copy of it.

lists.description: Per-concept list view overrides. Keys are concept names. Within a concept, each provided key ('columns', 'sort') replaces the effective value; the last applicable overlay wins per key.

columns.description: Visible list columns, in display order. Column names are the concept's field names plus 'id_presentation' and (for workflow concepts) 'state'. Fields not listed remain available through the column selector but start hidden.

sort.description: Default sort as '<field> ASC|DESC', like presentation.jsonc 'list_sort'.

forms.description: Per-concept form overrides for existing fields in create/edit/show views. Keys are concept names. 'hide'/'show' compose as set operations in file order; 'sizes' merges per key (last wins); 'move' patches accumulate in file order. Customizations never create fields.

hide.description: Field names to hide in forms and show views.

show.description: Field names to remove from the hidden set accumulated by earlier overlays.

sizes.description: Visual width overrides per field, as a fraction of the form row (mapped to grid columns). Fields not listed keep their generated width.

move.description: Granular reorder patches applied in order to the form's entry list. An entry is a field name or a composite block name (e.g. an address prefill group, which moves as a unit); entries never cross tab boundaries. Like menu targets, an entry name that does not resolve is skipped at runtime, so patches degrade gracefully as the model evolves.

field.description: Entry to move: a field name or a composite block name.

position.description: Zero-based index in the form's entry list.

labels.description: Vocabulary overrides. Flat per-key merge: the last applicable overlay that sets a key wins.

fields.description: Field label overrides keyed by '<concept>.<field>' (applies to forms, show views and list column headers).

titles.description: Page title overrides keyed by concept name (applies to the concept's list/edit/create/show pages).

workflow_states.description: Per-concept presentation-level visibility of workflow states. Keys are concept names with a workflow. Overlays compose as set operations in file order, like 'forms'. Hiding a state only removes it from the presentation (state selector, task grouping); the current state of a record is always shown, and transitions remain governed by the workflow rules.

show.description: State names to remove from the hidden set accumulated by earlier overlays.

op.description: rename: set the target's label. move: reposition the target within its parent or into another group. remove: delete the target (with its children). add: insert 'item'.

target.description: Entry to operate on: a concept name or workflow page name for leaf entries (stable across label changes), a group's label, or a '/'-separated label path (e.g. 'Sales/Orders') to disambiguate. Resolved against the menu state at the time the operation applies; first match wins (breadth-first).

into.description: Destination group for 'move'/'add', addressed like 'target'; empty string means the top level. Omitted on 'move' = stay in the current parent; omitted on 'add' = top level.

position.description: Zero-based index inside the destination ('move'/'add'). Omitted = append at the end.

item.description: Entry to insert ('add' only); groups may include 'children'.

label.description: Display label for the menu item

concept.description: Name of the concept (resource) to link to. Required for leaf nodes.

workflow.description: Link to a built-in workflow task page: 'assignable_tasks' (unassigned records the user can claim or assign) or 'my_tasks' (records assigned to the user).
